title: render_content uses naive string replace
description: In smallhold src/posting.rs lines 276-304, render_content() uses html.replace() for mentions and hashtags. This naive find-and-replace has two bugs: (1) if the same mention/hashtag text appears multiple times, the replacement link from the first pass gets re-matched and double-replaced on subsequent iterations; (2) the pattern can match inside HTML attribute values or URLs already present in the sanitized HTML. Fix: use a single-pass regex replacement, or replace on the source text before HTML rendering, or use indexed replacement to avoid re-scanning already-replaced content.
